name: Apple Cinnamon Coffee Cake #2
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat together the egg, sugar, oil, and vanilla until blended.
2. Add the buttermilk, then mix until all ingredients are well combined.
3. Gradually add the whole wheat flour, all-purpose flour, baking powder, and cinnamon sugar, stirring until smooth.
4. Place the batter in a lightly oiled 10-inch springform pan and arrange apple slices decoratively on top.
5. Sprinkle the remaining cinnamon sugar evenly over the top of the batter.
6. Bake at 350°F for about 35 to 40 minutes, or until a cake tester inserted into the center comes out clean.
7. Allow the cake to cool in the pan for a few minutes before removing it and dusting with 1 teaspoon sifted powdered sugar.
8. Serve and enjoy your coffee cake.
